comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Planning refinement: `/ralph configure` will become the ergonomic path for changing a captured contract. `/ralph start` should capture a sensible initial contract, while later edits happen explicitly through loop-state mutation rather than ambient Pi refresh.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Oracle review accepted: capture must be pure. Existing captureCurrentExecutionProfile mutates execution/tau session state, so Ralph start/configure needs a pure capture path for mode/model/thinking plus separate active-tool capture. Initial enabled agents must be captured before the session becomes Ralph-owned to avoid Ralph policy/cache contamination.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration progress: loop-start capture now persists the concrete model/thinking/policy profile shape via captureCurrentExecutionProfile, and schema/tests reject stale promptProfile/selector-shaped loop execution state. Remaining work before close: add explicit start/resume regression coverage for ambient Pi model/tool changes not mutating the pinned Ralph contract, and verify initial enabled-agent capture semantics against current non-Ralph agent selection.
